qa_pairs.question: What modules are required to run GROMACS version 2023.5 on CPUs within the StdEnv/2023 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: To run GROMACS version 2023.5 on CPUs within StdEnv/2023, you need to load `StdEnv/2023 gcc/12.3 openmpi/4.1.5 gromacs/2023.5`. This configuration uses GCC, FlexiBLAS, and FFTW.

qa_pairs.question: How can I enable GPU acceleration for GROMACS 2023.5 in the StdEnv/2023 environment, and what are the associated notes?
qa_pairs.answer: For GPU acceleration with GROMACS 2023.5 in StdEnv/2023, load the modules `StdEnv/2023 gcc/12.3 openmpi/4.1.5 cuda/12.2 gromacs/2023.5`. The configuration notes indicate it uses GCC, FlexiBLAS, and FFTW.

qa_pairs.answer: To use GROMACS 2023.3 on CPUs in StdEnv/2023, load `StdEnv/2023 gcc/12.3 openmpi/4.1.5 gromacs/2023.3`. The underlying components include GCC, FlexiBLAS, and FFTW.

qa_pairs.answer: For GPU-enabled GROMACS 2023.3 in StdEnv/2023, you should load `StdEnv/2023 gcc/12.3 openmpi/4.1.5 cuda/12.2 gromacs/2023.3`. This setup also utilizes GCC, FlexiBLAS, and FFTW.

qa_pairs.question: Which GROMACS versions under StdEnv/2020 are noted to use GCC, FlexiBLAS & FFTW for their configurations?
qa_pairs.answer: Under StdEnv/2020, GROMACS versions 2023.2, 2023, 2022.3, 2022.2, 2021.6, 2021.4, 2021.2 (the first entry for GPU, and its implied CPU), 2020.6, and 2020.4 (the first entry for GPU, and its implied CPU) are noted to use GCC, FlexiBLAS & FFTW.

qa_pairs.question: Which specific GROMACS versions in StdEnv/2020 utilize GCC & MKL as per the table?
qa_pairs.answer: In StdEnv/2020, GROMACS versions 2021.2 (the second entry with both CPU and GPU modules) and 2020.4 (the second entry with both CPU and GPU modules) specifically note the use of GCC & MKL.

qa_pairs.question: Are there any GROMACS versions listed for StdEnv/2020 that do not offer GPU (CUDA) module support?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, GROMACS version 2022.2 in StdEnv/2020 does not have any modules listed for running on GPUs (CUDA).

qa_pairs.question: Which GROMACS versions under StdEnv/2020 have multiple GPU module configurations with different CUDA versions or notes?
qa_pairs.answer: In StdEnv/2020, GROMACS 2021.2 has two GPU configurations: one with `cuda/11.4` and notes `GCC, FlexiBLAS & FFTW`, and another with `cuda/11.0` and notes `GCC & MKL`. GROMACS 2020.4 also has two GPU configurations: one with `cuda/11.4` and notes `GCC, FlexiBLAS & FFTW`, and another with `cuda/11.0` and notes `GCC & MKL`.
